full_text:
Ashwini Nagaraj demonstrated mincing the tissue sample. Aditi Sirsikar performed the rest of the tissue mincing, added 10 ml of Dispase and DNase according to the protocol, performed processing of the final pellet followed by 48 well plating. Remaining cells stored in cell banker for scRNAseq protocol optimization.

Final pellet was resuspended in culture medium I because we were not sure if there were enough cells to culture. Final pellet was spun down and resuspended in culture medium II with cytokines before plating.

Cell count 1):

total: 1.51E6 cells /mL

live: 1.01E6 cells /mL

viability: 67

size: 8.0 um

Cell count 2):

total: 1.26E6 cells /mL

live: 1.04E6 cells /mL

viability: 82%

size: 9.6 um

Noticed tumor cell aggregates, so cell count may be an estimating.

Total cell count: 1.385 e6 / mL

A) RNA/DNA extraction (20 drops):

48-well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE + flow: 20 wells x 40 µl x = 800 µl → round up to 850 µl

1000 cells/µl = 8.5E5

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 850 µl

volume to take from cell suspension: 614uL

ORG full medium → 94 uL

ome-gel → 120 µl

aprotinin → 2.8 µl

thrombin → 2.6 µl

fibrinogen → 17 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect e6 cells per 1 mL stemcell banker (1 vial)

Note to self: double check how much medium ii with cytokines was added to the final pellet

plate (1): For DNA & RNA & Flow & FFPE

Drops plated on 48 well suspension culture plates (CellStar, #677102)

Day 8 culture end point

On day 8 of culture, cells from 48 well plates were harvested for scRNA sequencing according to the protocol.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | SC | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA
Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | SC | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA
Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | Flow (no stain) | SC | FFPE | DNA | RNA | RNA
Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | Flow (no stain) | SC | FFPE | DNA | RNA | RNA
Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | SC | SC | FFPE | DNA | DNA | RNA
Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | SC | SC | FFPE | DNA | DNA | RNA
